title: Regulatory Affairs Specialist - Energy
Automation Engineer
description:
**Requistion ID**: 82740

  

Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, with a 130\-year history of innovation and service to the dental industry and patients worldwide. Dentsply Sirona develops, manufactures, and markets a comprehensive solutions offering including dental and oral health products as well as other consumable medical devices under a strong portfolio of world class brands. Dentsply Sirona’s products provide innovative, high\-quality and effective solutions to advance patient care and deliver better and safer dentistry. Dentsply Sirona’s global headquarters is located in Charlotte, North Carolina, USA. The company’s shares are listed in the United States on NASDAQ under the symbol XRAY.

 **Bringing out the best in people**

  



As advanced as dentistry is today, we are dedicated to making it even better. Our people have a passion for innovation and are committed to applying it to improve dental care. We live and breathe high performance, working as one global team, bringing out the best in each other for the benefit of dental patients, and the professionals who serve them. If you want to grow and develop as a part of a team that is shaping an industry, then we’re looking for the best to join us.

  



Working at Dentsply Sirona you are able to:

  



**Develop faster** \- with our commitment to the best professional development.

  



**Perform better** \- as part of a high\-performance, empowering culture.

  



**Shape an industry** \- with a market leader that continues to drive innovation.

  



**Make a difference** \-by helping improve oral health worldwide.

 **For our production site in Badia Polesine, we are looking for an:**

 **Automation Engineer**

  

The position will be responsible for the design, development, and implementation of industrial automation solutions, handling programming, testing, commissioning, process optimization, and technical support to ensure efficiency, quality, and reliability of the systems.

 **Responsibilities**

* Responsible for the design and development of automation systems (PLC, HMI, SCADA, robotics), defining process requirements and technical specifications.
* Responsible for diagnosing complex faults on PLCs, industrial networks, sensors, and actuators.
* Manages commissioning and testing of systems, organizing Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT) and Site Acceptance Tests (SAT), overseeing start‑up, calibration, and optimization of control logic.
* Supports the maintenance team in ensuring correct operation and efficiency of systems in compliance with current Safety, Environmental, and Quality procedures.
* Supports the engineering team with software updates, hardware upgrades, and troubleshooting during start‑ups, restarts, and normal plant operations.
* Defines process KPIs and performs data analysis to improve efficiency, quality, and scrap reduction (Lean approach).
* Coordinates suppliers and system integrators during field activities and ensures that all required technical documentation is prepared and archived (diagrams, manuals, declarations of conformity).
* Supports the QAS (Quality, Environment \& Safety Manager) in managing interactions with regulatory and certification bodies, and in preparing and reviewing Validation protocols within Operations.
* Respects company standards, corporate vision, colleagues, and customers.

 **Skills**

* Education: Degree in Automation Engineering, Mechatronics, Electronics, or equivalent.
* Fluent knowledge of Italian and technical English.
* Experience with MES integration and at least 3 years in a similar role.
* Knowledge of industry standards and regulations (ISO, CE, Machinery Directive).
* Technical drawing skills (reading P\&ID, electrical diagrams, automation layouts).
* Knowledge of industrial networks (PROFINET, EtherCAT, Ethernet/IP, Modbus).
* Industrial robotics experience (Fanuc, Epson, ABB, KUKA, Yaskawa).
* Knowledge of major SCADA/HMI systems (WinCC, FactoryTalk, Movicon, Ignition).
* Basic PLC programming skills (Siemens, Rockwell, Schneider, Omron or others depending on context).
* Experience with automation system design software (Studio 5000, FactoryTalk).
* Alignment with company values: Respect (for company standards, vision, colleagues and customers), Responsibility, Collaboration, Reliability, and Agility (continuous improvement).
* Flexibility: ability to adapt to context and support colleagues and supervisors.
* Participation in continuous improvement initiatives.
* Excellent knowledge of Microsoft Office tools.
* Strong organizational skills, multitasking ability, and autonomy.
* Precision, proactivity, and punctuality in meeting deadlines.

  

Dentsply Sirona is an Equal Opportunity/ Affirmative Action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, sexual orientation, disability, or protected Veteran status. We appreciate your interest in Dentsply Sirona.


If you need assistance with completing the online application due to a disability, please send an accommodation request to careers@dentsplysirona.com. Please be sure to include “Accommodation Request” in the subject.

title: Senior CRA
description:
**Work Schedule**


Other**Environmental Conditions**


Office**Job Description**


At PPD, part of Thermo Fisher Scientific, you’ll discover meaningful work that makes a positive impact on a global scale. Join our colleagues in bringing our Mission to life \- enabling our customers to make the world healthier, cleaner and safer. We provide our teams with the resources needed to achieve individual career goals while taking science a step beyond through research, development and delivery of life\-changing therapies. With clinical trials conducted in 100\+ countries and ongoing development of novel frameworks for clinical research through our PPD clinical research portfolio, our work spans laboratory, digital and decentralized clinical trial services. Your determination to deliver quality and accuracy will improve health outcomes that people and communities depend on – now and in the future.


This is a great opportunity for experienced Senior CRA's currently working within the life science sector for pharmaceutical companies, biotech companies or CRO's to work with a world\-leading CRO across multiple sponsors, various protocols and therapy areas.


These roles can be performed remotely for CRA's based close to our clinical 'hubs': **Milan, Bologna, Florence, Rome** and **Naples.** Travel requirement will be national across Italy.

**Essential Functions:**
------------------------

* Monitors investigator sites with a risk\-based monitoring approach: applies root cause analysis (RCA), critical thinking and problem\-solving skills to identify site processes failure and corrective/preventive actions to bring the site into compliance and decrease risks.
* Ensures data accuracy through SDR, SDV and CRF review as applicable through on\-site and remote monitoring activities.
* Assess investigational product through physical inventory and records review.
* Documents observations in reports and letters according to timelines using approved business writing standards.
* Escalates observed deficiencies and issues to clinical management expeditiously and follows all issues through to resolution. May need to maintain regular contact between monitoring visits with investigative sites to confirm that the protocol is being followed, that previously identified issues are being resolved and that the data is being recorded in a timely manner.
* Participates in the investigator payment process. Ensures a shared responsibility with other project team members on issues/findings resolution. Investigates and follows\-up on findings as applicable.
* Participates in investigator meetings as necessary. Identifies potential investigators in collaboration with the client company to ensure the acceptability of qualified investigative sites.
* Initiates clinical trial sites according to the relevant procedures to ensure compliance with the protocol and regulatory and ICH GCP obligations, making recommendations where warranted. Performs trial close out and retrieval of trial materials.
* Ensures that required essential documents are complete and in place, according to ICH\-GCP and applicable regulations. Conducts on\-site file reviews as per project specifications.
* Provides trial status tracking and progress update reports to the Clinical Team Manager (CTM) as required. Ensures study systems are updated per agreed study conventions (e.g. Clinical Trial Management System).
* Contributes to the project team by assisting in preparation of project publications/tools and sharing ideas/suggestions with team members.
* Contributes to other project work and initiatives for process improvement, as required.

**Education and Experience:**
-----------------------------

* University degree in a science related field
* CRA Qualified as per the Ministerial Decree dated 15/11/2011 and **at least 3 years** of independent monitoring experience in clinical development phases II\-IV
* Understanding of ICH\-GCP, EU and FDA requirements
* Fluency in English and in Italian
* Valid Driver's License

**Knowledge, Skills and Abilities:**
------------------------------------

* Proven clinical monitoring skills
* Demonstrated understanding of medical/therapeutic area knowledge and medical terminology
* Demonstrated ability to attain and maintain a working knowledge of ICH GCPs, applicable regulations and procedural documents
* Well\-developed critical thinking skills, including but not limited to: critical mindset, in\-depth investigation for appropriate root cause analysis and problem solving
* Ability to manage Risk Based Monitoring concepts and processes
* Good oral and written communication skills, with the ability to communicate effectively with medical personnel
* Ability to maintain customer focus through the utilization of good listening skills, attention to detail and the ability to perceive customers’ underlying issues
* Good organizational and time management skills
* Effective interpersonal skills
* Attention to detail
* Ability to remain flexible and adaptable in a wide range of scenarios
* Ability to work in a team or independently as require
* Good computer skills: solid knowledge of Microsoft Office and the ability to learn appropriate software


As well as being rewarded a competitive salary, we have an extensive benefits package based around the health and well\-being of our employees. We have a flexible working culture, where PPD truly value a work\-life balance. We’ve grown sustainably year on year but continue to offer a collaborative environment, with teams of colleagues eager to share expertise and have fun together. We are a global organization but with a local feel.

**Our 4i Values:**

**Integrity – Innovation – Intensity – Involvement**


If you resonate with our 4i values above, and ultimately wish to accelerate the delivery of safe and effective therapeutics for some of the world’s most urgent health needs, submit your application – we’d love to hear from you!
company_description: At Thermo Fisher Scientific, our professionals develop critical solutions—and build rewarding careers.

title: Senior Product Manager - Digital Solutions
description:
**Creating Peace of Mind by Pioneering Safety and Security**
------------------------------------------------------------

*At Allegion, we help keep the people you know and love safe and secure where they live, work and visit. With more than 30 brands, 12,000\+ employees globally and products sold in 130 countries, we specialize in security around the doorway and* *beyond. Additionally,* *in 2024 we were awarded the Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award, which recognizes the most engaged workplace cultures in the world.***Key Responsibilities**
The Senior Product Manager \- Digital Solutions will develop and deploy a comprehensive product strategy and roadmap for digital solutions across residential, commercial, and hospitality verticals within the Home and Work division. This role will drive profitable growth by identifying market opportunities, defining product requirements, and leading cross\-functional teams to deliver innovative digital products that meet customer needs and exceed business objectives.**Specific responsibilities include:*** Product Strategy \& Vision: Develop and own the end\-to\-end product strategy and multi\-year roadmap for digital solutions spanning residential, commercial, and hospitality markets, ensuring alignment with division goals and market demands.
* P\&L Accountability: financial performance of the digital solutions portfolio, including revenue targets, margin optimization, and profitability objectives. Monitor and report on sales and margin performance regularly.
* Global Collaboration: Build relationships and network with global colleagues to maximize synergies, share best practices, leverage innovation, and utilize product management tools and frameworks.
* Market Analysis \& Customer Insights: Analyze market trends, technology advancements, competitor activity, voice of customer (VOC), and regulatory changes across all three verticals to inform strategic product decisions and identify growth opportunities.
* Product Lifecycle Management: Manage the complete product lifecycle from ideation through development, launch, growth, maturity, and end\-of\-life, ensuring products continue to meet evolving customer needs and market dynamics.
* Innovation \& Differentiation: Drive innovation initiatives that maintain competitive advantage, establish clear market positioning, and create meaningful points of difference for digital solutions in each vertical.
* Requirements Definition: Translate customer needs and market opportunities into detailed product requirements, user stories, and technical specifications that guide development teams.
* Go\-to\-Market Strategy: Work closely with sales and marketing leadership to establish pricing strategies, customer segmentation, positioning, branding strategies, and launch programs that maximize profitability and market penetration across different markets.
* Stakeholder Management: Present product strategies, roadmaps, and performance updates to senior leadership; build consensus and secure resources for strategic initiatives.
* Voice of Customer Programs: Establish and maintain ongoing VOC programs including customer advisory boards, beta testing, and feedback loops to inform product decisions
* Thought Leadership: Stay current with emerging technologies, digital transformation trends, IoT platforms, cloud services, and smart building innovations relevant to the residential, commercial, and hospitality sectors


\-
**Skills and Experience/Education Requirements****Required Qualifications:*** Bachelor’s degree in business, Engineering, Computer Science, or related field;
* Minimum 7\-10 years of product management experience with at least 5 years focused on digital products, software, or connected solutions.
* Proven track record of successfully launching and scaling digital products in B2B and/or B2C markets with demonstrable revenue and market share growth.
* Good technical acumen with ability to understand software architecture, cloud platforms, IoT ecosystems, and emerging technologies.
* Demonstrated ability to influence senior management and drive strategic decision\-making through data\-driven insights.
* Analytical skills with proficiency in product analytics tools, market research methodologies, and financial modeling.
* Fluent in English (both written and spoken)

**Preferred Qualifications:*** Experience in hardware/software integration, smart building technology, access control, or security solutions.
* Knowledge of residential, commercial real estate, or hospitality industry dynamics and buying behaviors.
* Understanding of product development processes, supply chain dynamics, and distribution channels in technology or construction industries.
* Experience working in a matrix organization

**Leadership \& Communication:*** Effective communication skills (both oral and written) with ability to present complex concepts to diverse audiences.


 •• Strong leadership skills with ability to drive cross\-functional teams to deliver on critical business priorities without direct authority.* Strong executive presence and change management capabilities
* Proven ability to build consensus, manage conflict, and navigate organizational complexity
* Talent for mentoring and developing junior product managers and cross\-functional team members

**Business \& Strategic Skills:*** Strong business acumen with expertise in driving profitable growth through KPIs and financial metrics.
* Strategic thinking with ability to balance long\-term vision with short\-term execution priorities
* Ability to effectively operate within a matrix environment and collaborate across all levels and functions
* Customer\-centric mindset with passion for solving real customer problems.


Other Requirements:* Ability to travel as needed (approximately 25\-30%) to customer sites, trade shows, partner locations, and company facilities.
* Flexibility to work with global teams across different time zones

**We Celebrate Who We Are!**
----------------------------


Allegion is committed to building and maintaining a diverse and inclusive workplace. Together, we embrace all differences and similarities among colleagues, as well as the differences and similarities within the relationships that we foster with customers, suppliers and the communities where we live and work. Whatever your background, experience, race, color, national origin, religion, age, gender, gender identity, disability status, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law, we will make sure that you have every opportunity to impress us in your application and the opportunity to give your best at work, not because we’re required to, but because it’s the right thing to do. We are also committed to providing accommodations for persons with disabilities. If for any reason you cannot apply through our career site and require an accommodation or assistance, please contact our Talent Acquisition Team.
© Allegion plc, 2023 \| Block D, Iveagh Court, Harcourt Road, Dublin 2, Co. Dublin, Ireland
REGISTERED IN IRELAND WITH LIMITED LIABILITY REGISTERED NUMBER 527370
Allegion is an equal opportunity and affirmative action employer

title: Field Services Coordinator (12 Month Contract)
description:
Basis:


Fixed Term Employee


Area of Interest:


Support Operations


Location:


Ferrara, Italy


**Who we are:**
---------------


Geotab ® is a global leader in IoT and connected transportation and certified “Great Place to Work™.” We are a company of diverse and talented individuals who work together to help businesses grow and succeed, and increase the safety and sustainability of our communities.

Geotab is advancing security, connecting commercial vehicles to the internet and providing web\-based analytics to help customers better manage their fleets. Geotab’s open platform and Geotab Marketplace ®, offering hundreds of third\-party solution options, allows both small and large businesses to automate operations by integrating vehicle data with their other data assets. Processing billions of data points a day, Geotab leverages data analytics and machine learning to improve productivity, optimize fleets through the reduction of fuel consumption, enhance driver safety and achieve strong compliance to regulatory changes.

Our team is growing and we’re looking for people who follow their passion, think differently and want to make an impact. Ours is a fast paced, ever changing environment. Geotabbers accept that challenge and are willing to take on new tasks and activities \- ones that may not always be described in the initial job description. Join us for a fulfilling career with opportunities to innovate, great benefits, and our fun and inclusive work culture. Reach your full potential with Geotab. To see what it’s like to be a Geotabber, check out our blog and follow us @InsideGeotab on Instagram. Join our talent network to learn more about job opportunities and company news.
**Who you are:**
----------------



We are always looking for amazing talent who can contribute to our growth and deliver results! Geotab is seeking a Field Services Coordinator who will support operations across multiple European markets. If you love technology and are keen to join an industry leader — we would love to hear from you!

  

**What you'll do:**
-------------------



As a Field Services Coordinator, your key area of responsibility will be managing complex service operations across borders and cultures. You will need to work closely with field technicians, customers, and internal teams like Logistics, Sales, and Customer Success, as well as communicate with third\-party service partners.  

To be successful in this role, you will be a highly organized professional with strong technical knowledge and the ability to manage multiple timelines to ensure timely results. In addition, the successful candidate will have strong analytical skills with an ability to identify process improvements, increase efficiency, and ensure compliance with local regulations and safety standards.

  

**How you'll make an impact:**
------------------------------


* Coordinate and schedule field service activities (installations, maintenance, rip and replace) across assigned market(s).
* Act as the primary point of contact between field technicians, customers, and internal teams.
* Manage service requests, work orders, and ensure timely completion of field operations.
* Track and report on service KPIs, SLAs, and field performance metrics.
* Maintain accurate records in internal systems.
* Collaborate with other teams (logistics, sales, training, customer success) to ensure a smooth and successful customer experience.
* Support coordination of third\-party service partners and subcontractors.
* Identify process improvements to increase field service efficiency and customer satisfaction.
* Escalate technical issues to engineering or product teams as needed.
* Ensure compliance with local regulations, health \& safety standards, and company policies.

**What you'll bring to this role:**
-----------------------------------


* Exceptional verbal and written fluency in English and Italian is required, with professional level proficiency in French preferred.
* 2\+ years of experience in field service coordination, logistics, operations, or a related technical coordination role.
* Experience in telematics, fleet management, automotive, IoT, or a related technology sector is a strong asset.
* Post\-secondary education in a technical, logistics, or business\-related field (or equivalent experience)
* Familiarity with vehicle electrical systems and hardware installation processes.
* Ability to read and interpret technical documentation and installation guides.
* Proficiency with service management platforms.
* Comfortable using data and reporting tools to track service performance.
* Comfortable integrating AI usage in the daily duties.
* Exceptional organizational and time management skills — ability to manage multiple priorities across different markets and time zones.
* Strong communication skills — able to coordinate effectively with diverse, cross\-functional, and multicultural teams.
* Detail\-oriented with a proactive, solution\-driven mindset.
* Ability to work autonomously in a fast\-paced, remote environment.
* Customer\-centric approach with a strong sense of accountability.
* This position is location\-flexible within Europe. Candidates will not necessarily be based in the country they support.
If you got this far, we hope you're feeling excited about this role! Even if you don't feel you meet every single requirement, we still encourage you to apply.

**Please note: Geotab does not accept agency resumes and is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes. Please do not forward resumes to Geotab employees.**

**How we work:**
----------------


At Geotab, we have adopted a flexible hybrid working model in that we have systems, functions, programs and policies in place to support both in\-person and virtual work. However, you are welcomed and encouraged to come into our beautiful, safe, clean offices as often as you like. When working from home, you are required to have a reliable internet connection with at least 50mb DL/10mb UL. Virtual work is supported with cloud\-based applications, collaboration tools and asynchronous working. The health and safety of employees are a top priority. We encourage work\-life balance and keep the Geotab culture going strong with online social events, chat rooms and gatherings. Join us and help reshape the future of technology!

We believe that ensuring diversity is fundamental to our future growth and progress and is an integral part of our business. We believe that success happens where new ideas can flourish – in an environment that is rich in diversity and a place where people from various backgrounds can work together. Geotab encourages applications from all qualified individuals. We are committed to accommodating people with disabilities during the recruitment and assessment processes and when people are hired. We will ensure the accessibility needs of employees with disabilities are taken into account as part of performance management, career development, training and redeployment processes. If you require accommodation at any stage of the application process or want more information about our diversity and inclusion as well as accommodation policies and practices, please contact us at careers@geotab.com. By submitting a job application to Geotab Inc. or its affiliates and subsidiaries (collectively, “Geotab”), you acknowledge Geotab’s collection, use and disclosure of your personal data in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

title: QA Supervisor
description:
**Requistion ID**: 82736

  

DENTSPLY SIRONA è il più grande produttore mondiale di prodotti dentali professionali e di tecnologie, con una storia di 130 anni di innovazione e servizi per il settore dentale e per i pazienti in tutto il mondo. DENTSPLY SIRONA sviluppa, produce e commercializza un’ampia offerta di soluzioni complete, come anche prodotti per la salute orale e dentale, nonché altri dispositivi medici utilizzati nell'ambito di un vasto portafoglio di marchi di fama mondiale. Come Dental Solution Company TM, i prodotti di Dentsply Sirona forniscono soluzioni efficaci, innovative e di alta qualità per migliorare la cura del paziente e fornire un servizio di odontoiatria sempre migliore, più sicuro e più veloce. La sede globale di Dentsply Sirona si trova a Charlotte, North Carolina. Le azioni della società sono pubblicate al NASDAQ, negli Stati Uniti con il simbolo XRAY.

 **Trarre il meglio dalle persone**

  

Per quanto avanzata sia oggi l'odontoiatria, ci dedichiamo a renderla ancora migliore. Le nostre persone hanno una passione per l'innovazione e si impegnano ad applicarla per migliorare le cure dentali. Viviamo e respiriamo elevate prestazioni, lavorando come un unico team globale, facendo emergere il meglio l'uno nell'altro a beneficio dei pazienti e dei professionisti del dentale che li servono. Se vuoi crescere e sviluppare come parte di un team che sta plasmando un settore, allora stiamo cercando il meglio per unirsi a noi.

  

Lavorando presso Dentsply Sirona è possibile:

 **Cresci più velocemente**...il nostro impegno per un migliore sviluppo professionale.

 **Lavora meglio**...nell'ambito di una cultura aziendale basata su elevate prestazioni e consapevolezza.

 **Dai forma al settore**...con un leader di mercato che continua a guidare l'innovazione.

 **Fai la differenza**...aiutando il miglioramento della salute orale nel mondo.

  

Per il nostro sito produttivo di Badia Polesine ricerchiamo un/una:

 **QA Supervisor**

  

La figura, rispondendo al Sr. QA Manager, dovrà garantire che le attività di ispezione sui materiali (in accettazione, in process e sul prodotto finito) vengano condotte in accordo ai requisiti stabiliti.

 **Responsabilità:**

* Garantire i processi di audit interno, calibrazione, investigazione dei reclami ed investigazione sulle non conformità e CAPA siano eseguite in accordo agli standard aziendali
* Garantire che il personale di qualità sia correttamente formato ed informato sulle procedure applicabili.
* Conoscenza della norma ISO 13485, MDR ed altre correlate al mondo dei dispositivi medici
* Capacità di bilanciare le responsabilità individuali e quelle del team e contribuire ad un ambiente di lavoro positivo
* Familiarità con i piani di campionamento (ANSI, AQL ecc.)
* Qualifica come Auditor interno
* Conoscenza delle buone pratiche di laboratorio

 **Competenze:**

* Esperienza in materia di controllo qualità nei dispositivi medici o in settori simili
* Conoscenza del pacchetto Microsoft Office
* Preferibile saper interpretare disegni meccanici
* Conoscenza base dell’uso di calibratori, microscopi, bilance digitali, comparatori ottici
* Conoscenza del funzionamento di ERP (SAP/AX)
* Predisposizione al lavoro di squadra
* Buona capacità comunicativa sia scritta che orale
* Conoscenza fluente della lingua italiana.
* Conoscenza lingua inglese. E’ sufficiente un livello B2
* Ordine e precisione nella registrazione dei dati e nella loro corretta archiviazione
* Adesione ai valori aziendali di Rispetto (degli standard aziendali, della visione aziendale, dei colleghi e dei clienti), Responsabilità, Collaborazione, Affidabilità e Agilità (miglioramento continuo).

  

\#LI\-IC1

  

Dentsply Sirona è un’Azienda di Pari Opportunità / Azione Positiva. Ogni candidato qualificato verrà valutato senza distinzione di razza, colore, religione, sesso, nazionalità, età, orientamento sessuale, disabilità. Apprezziamo il tuo interesse per Dentsply Sirona. Se hai bisogno di assistenza per completare la domanda on\-line a causa di una disabilità, ti preghiamo di inviare una richiesta di supporto per la compilazione a: careers@dentsplysirona.com. Ti chiediamo di essere sicuro/a di aver indicato nell’oggetto "Richiesta di supporto".

title: HSE Specialist
description:
DENTSPLY SIRONA è il più grande produttore mondiale di prodotti dentali professionali e di tecnologie, con una storia di 130 anni di innovazione e servizi per il settore dentale e per i pazienti in tutto il mondo. DENTSPLY SIRONA sviluppa, produce e commercializza un’ampia offerta di soluzioni complete, come anche prodotti per la salute orale e dentale, nonché altri dispositivi medici utilizzati nell'ambito di un vasto portafoglio di marchi di fama mondiale. Come Dental Solution Company TM, i prodotti di Dentsply Sirona forniscono soluzioni efficaci, innovative e di alta qualità per migliorare la cura del paziente e fornire un servizio di odontoiatria sempre migliore, più sicuro e più veloce. La sede globale di Dentsply Sirona si trova a Charlotte, North Carolina. Le azioni della società sono pubblicate al NASDAQ, negli Stati Uniti con il simbolo XRAY.

 **Trarre il meglio dalle persone**

  

Per quanto avanzata sia oggi l'odontoiatria, ci dedichiamo a renderla ancora migliore. Le nostre persone hanno una passione per l'innovazione e si impegnano ad applicarla per migliorare le cure dentali. Viviamo e respiriamo elevate prestazioni, lavorando come un unico team globale, facendo emergere il meglio l'uno nell'altro a beneficio dei pazienti e dei professionisti del dentale che li servono. Se vuoi crescere e sviluppare come parte di un team che sta plasmando un settore, allora stiamo cercando il meglio per unirsi a noi.

  

Lavorando presso Dentsply Sirona è possibile:

 **Cresci più velocemente**...il nostro impegno per un migliore sviluppo professionale.

 **Lavora meglio**...nell'ambito di una cultura aziendale basata su elevate prestazioni e consapevolezza.

 **Dai forma al settore**...con un leader di mercato che continua a guidare l'innovazione.

 **Fai la differenza**...aiutando il miglioramento della salute orale nel mondo.

  

Per il nostro sito produttivo di Badia Polesine ricerchiamo un/una:

 **HSE Specialist**

  



La figura supporta a diretto riporto dell’HSE Manager avrà le seguenti responsabilità.

 **Responsabilità:**

* Sulla base del piano annuale dei controlli di Salute e Sicurezza sul Lavoro assicura l'esecuzione dei controlli per il mantenimento dello stato di sicurezza degli impianti, attrezzature e luoghi di lavoro in tutte le aree aziendali garantendo interventi tempestivi ed efficaci.
* E’ responsabile della ottemperanza aziendale alla direttiva PED.
* E’ responsabile della organizzazione della formazione di sicurezza del personale aziendale gestendo sia l’inserimento dei nuovi assunti che gli aggiornamenti degli attuali dipendenti.
* E’ responsabile della compilazione delle indagini sugli infortuni o mancati infortuni individuando le opportune azioni correttive. Mantiene aggiornato il database per il calcolo degli indici sugli infortuni e mancati infortuni e indici di gravità.
* Gestisce la documentazione relativa all’art.26 del D.lgs 81 e promuove la coordinazione e il coordinamento con le ditte esterne
* Mantiene i rapporti con il Medico Competente e collabora con esso per la pianificazione e l’effettuazione del sopralluogo in ambiente di lavoro e per il successivo aggiornamento del Protocollo Sanitario se necessario.
* Collabora con il team per la gestione del Sistema Gestione Sicurezza ed il rinnovo delle certificazioni quali ISO 45001 ed ISO 14001\.
* Promozione di campagne di sensibilizzazione del personale in materia HSE.
* Supporto attivo ai vari Reparti operativi circa la redazione di procedure di sicurezza.
* Supporto nella Redazione, Gestione e Aggiornamento del Documento di Valutazione dei Rischi
* Promozione, organizzazione e conduzione di incontri di formazione e/o informazione per il personale
* Verifica costante del rispetto delle disposizioni di legge in materia HSE per tutte le attività svolte all'interno dello Stabilimento
* Partecipazione alle iniziative di miglioramento continuo

**Competenze**

* Istruzione universitaria o post\-universitaria attinente alla materia salute e sicurezza
* Conoscenza fluente della lingua italiana.
* Lingua Inglese fluente/upper intermediate (B2\);
* Buona/ottima conoscenza di Microsoft Office;
* Capacità di auto organizzazione e gestione progetti (time planning, milestones)
* Gradita precedente esperienza di lavoro in aziende industriali
* Adesione ai valori aziendali di Rispetto (degli standard aziendali, della visione aziendale, dei colleghi e dei clienti, dei processi e delle istruzioni operative), Responsabilità, Collaborazione, Affidabilità e Agilità (miglioramento continuo)
* Precisione e attenzione, capacità di analisi ed elaborazione di documenti e regolamenti
* Flessibilità: adattare il proprio operato al contesto, essere disponibili con colleghi e responsabili
* Collaborazione e teamwork con i colleghi e responsabili del proprio e di altri reparti


\#LI\-IC1

  

Dentsply Sirona è un’Azienda di Pari Opportunità / Azione Positiva. Ogni candidato qualificato verrà valutato senza distinzione di razza, colore, religione, sesso, nazionalità, età, orientamento sessuale, disabilità. Apprezziamo il tuo interesse per Dentsply Sirona. Se hai bisogno di assistenza per completare la domanda on\-line a causa di una disabilità, ti preghiamo di inviare una richiesta di supporto per la compilazione a: careers@dentsplysirona.com. Ti chiediamo di essere sicuro/a di aver indicato nell’oggetto "Richiesta di supporto".
company_description: Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies.

title: Operatore Gruppi Elettrogeni
description:
**Chi siamo**

Powering è una realtà leader in Italia nel settore del noleggio e della gestione di gruppi elettrogeni. L’azienda si distingue per la sua presenza capillare sul territorio nazionale, grazie a oltre 60 centri logistici distribuiti in tutta Italia, che garantiscono interventi tempestivi anche nelle aree più remote. La nostra Centrale Operativa attiva 24 ore su 24, 7 giorni su 7, assicura un servizio continuo e altamente reattivo, in grado di rispondere a qualsiasi esigenza energetica, programmata o d’emergenza, con rapidità ed efficienza. Con una flotta in continua evoluzione e personale altamente qualificato, Powering è sinonimo di affidabilità, innovazione e servizio al cliente.

**Descrizione del ruolo**

Siamo alla ricerca di un **Tecnico Addetto al Rifornimento e Manutenzione Gruppi Elettrogeni** motivato e con competenze meccaniche, da inserire nel nostro team operativo.

**Responsabilità principali:**

La risorsa selezionata si occuperà delle seguenti attività:

* Effettuare il rifornimento di carburante dei gruppi elettrogeni presso i siti dei clienti
* Eseguire controlli periodici e manutenzione ordinaria dei gruppi elettrogeni
* Verificare il corretto funzionamento degli impianti attraverso test e ispezioni visive
* Diagnosticare e risolvere problematiche meccaniche di base
* Compilare report tecnici relativi agli interventi effettuati
* Gestire le scorte di materiali di consumo e ricambi necessari
* Garantire il rispetto delle normative di sicurezza durante tutte le operazioni
* Mantenere rapporti professionali con i clienti durante gli interventi in loco

**Requisiti**

Competenze Tecniche:

* Conoscenze meccaniche di base o esperienza pregressa in ambito meccanico
* Capacità di lettura e interpretazione di schemi tecnici (preferibile)
* Familiarità con strumenti e attrezzature meccaniche
* Disponibilità a effettuare trasferte anche di più giorni

Formazione:

* Diploma di scuola secondaria superiore, preferibilmente in ambito tecnico\-meccanico

Competenze Personali:

* Autonomia operativa e capacità di problem solving
* Attitudine al lavoro sul campo e disponibilità a trasferte
* Precisione e attenzione ai dettagli
* Buone capacità organizzative
* Orientamento alla sicurezza sul lavoro
* **Patente C\+CQC in corso di validità (indispensabile)**

Requisiti Preferenziali:

* Esperienza pregressa nella manutenzione di gruppi elettrogeni o motori diesel
* Conoscenze di base di elettrotecnica
* Attestati di sicurezza per lavori in quota o in ambienti confinati

**Cosa Offriamo:**

· Formazione tecnica specifica sui nostri impianti

· Dotazione di strumenti di lavoro e dispositivi di protezione individuale

· Ambiente di lavoro dinamico e in crescita

· Possibilità di sviluppo professionale

*“In Powering crediamo che la diversità sia un valore. Favoriamo un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo e incoraggiamo la candidatura di persone appartenenti a minoranze e categorie protette, nel rispetto delle pari opportunità.”*

Contratto di lavoro: Tempo pieno, Somministrazione

Benefit:

* Buoni pasto
* Cellulare aziendale
* Supporto allo sviluppo professionale

Esperienza:

* Autista: 5 anni (Obbligatorio)

Abilitazione/Certificazione:

* Patente C (Obbligatorio)
* Patente CQC (Obbligatorio)
* Patente CE (Preferenziale)

Sede di lavoro: Di persona

title: Commerciale Outbound (Lead Generation B2B) – Marketing & Digital
description:
**Chi siamo**

Siamo Lynx, agenzia di marketing che lavora con aziende B2B su crescita, lead generation e posizionamento digitale.

**Stiamo espandendo il team commerciale con una figura outbound che ci aiuti a generare nuove opportunità in modo strutturato.**

Stiamo cercando qualcuno che voglia costruire risultati (e guadagni reali)

**Ammettiamo che non è un lavoro per tutti**

**Questo ruolo è adatto a te se:**

* non hai paura di prendere il telefono
* sai gestire il rifiuto senza perderti
* hai voglia di guadagnare più della media

**Se cerchi comfort, routine o “posto tranquillo”, probabilmente non è il contesto giusto.**

**Quale sarà il tuo lavoro**

* Contatterai aziende target (telefono \+ LinkedIn)
* Genererai appuntamenti qualificati per il team commerciale
* Lavorerai su liste profilate (nessuna chiamata random)
* Utilizzerai campagne e servizi con domanda reale

**La persona che stiamo cercando ha**

* Mentalità commerciale e orientamento ai risultati
* Esperienza (anche minima) in telemarketing o vendita
* Costanza e disciplina
* Fame di crescita economica

**Nota importante: qui vieni premiato per quello che produci, non per il tempo che passi seduto**

**Abbiamo strutturato per te un piano compensi, eccolo:**

* Fisso mensile: 1000€
* Gettone bonus per ogni appuntamento in target fissato
* % sulle vendite generate dai commerciali sugli appuntamenti da te fissati
* Bonus al raggiungimento di obiettivi mensili

**Ovviamente non esiste un tetto massimo a quanto puoi guadagnare**

**Ti starai chiedendo perché Lynx?**

* Metodo commerciale già testato e funzionante
* Lavori su target e servizi richiesti dal mercato
* Formazione concreta e operativa
* Ambiente diretto, meritocratico e orientato ai risultati
* Possibilità reale di crescita

**Modalità di collaborazione:**

**Collaborazione in partita IVA, con gestione autonoma dell’attività.**

Contratto di lavoro: Contratto con partita IVA

Retribuzione: €1\.000,00 \- €10\.000,00 al mese

Sede di lavoro: Ibrido/da remoto (41126 Modena)

title: Commerciale Fotovoltaico – Bologna & Romagna
description:
**Sales Valley** è una boutique HR specializzata nella selezione di profili commerciali.  

Per un’azienda italiana in rapida crescita nel settore delle **energie rinnovabili** e dell’**efficienza energetica** (impianti fotovoltaici, solare termico, infissi ad alta prestazione), selezioniamo un Commerciale per la zona di Bologna e Romagna.  

La realtà cliente, con sede a Parma e studio tecnico a Treviso, conta oltre **50 risorse tra team interno e rete vendita**.  

Collabora con **grandi gruppi industriali e utility nazionali** – tra cui **Barilla, IREN ed EDISON** – e si distingue per **qualità tecnica, visione sostenibile e approccio consulenziale**.  

Cerchiamo un Commerciale Fotovoltaico con esperienza nella vendita sul campo, interessat a crescere in un settore in forte espansione come quello delle energie rinnovabili.  

Un’opportunità concreta per entrare in una realtà solida, con **lead qualificati mensili**, **formazione continua** e **possibilità di sviluppare il proprio mercato in autonomia**.

**Area di competenza**


Zona di lavoro: **Bologna, Romagna**, con possibilità di espansione in **Veneto e Marche** (entro 100 km dalla residenza).

**Cosa farai**

* **Gestirai trattative di vendita B2C** nel settore fotovoltaico e delle soluzioni energetiche per privati.
* **Acquisirai nuovi clienti** attraverso attività sul campo e canali digitali, con **lead qualificati forniti dall’azienda**.
* **Parteciperai a fiere ed eventi di settore**, promuovendo soluzioni sostenibili.
* **Utilizzerai strumenti digitali** (CRM, LinkedIn) per la generazione di contatti.
* **Svilupperai il canale B2B**, gestendo trattative con aziende e clienti industriali.

**Chi cerchiamo**


Un professionista della vendita con mentalità imprenditoriale, capace di lavorare in autonomia e orientat al risultato.

**Requisiti obbligatori**

* **Esperienza commerciale sul campo**, preferibilmente nei settori energia, impiantistica o affini.
* **Capacità di lavorare per obiettivi**, gestendo in autonomia il proprio territorio.
* **Ottime doti relazionali e comunicative**, sia con privati che con aziende.
* Possesso di **auto, PC e telefono personali**.
* Iscrizione **Enasarco** o **disponibilità a iscriversi.**

***Requisiti preferenziali***

* *Esperienza nella vendita di impianti fotovoltaici o soluzioni per l’efficienza energetica.*
* *Familiarità con trattative complesse e utilizzo di* ***strumenti digitali per la vendita****.*

**Cosa offriamo**

* **Collaborazione con Partita IVA (agente commerciale)**.
* **Fisso mensile garantito**, in base all’esperienza.
* **Provvigioni su vendite B2C e B2B**, con un sistema di incentivazione strutturato e premi mensili legati a performance e referenze.
* **Bonus on top fino a 2\.500 € al mese** e **premi annuali** basati sui risultati.
* **Lead qualificati mensili forniti dall’azienda**
* **Supporto marketing e strategico** per la generazione di nuovi contatti e il mantenimento della clientela acquisita.
* **Percorso di crescita reale**: dalla gestione di clienti residenziali alla trattativa con aziende e realtà industriali.
* **Formazione tecnica e commerciale continua**, sia in aula che sul campo.
* **Autonomia organizzativa** nella gestione dell’agenda e del territorio.
* **Ambiente giovane e dinamico**

**Perché scegliere questa opportunità**


Entra in una realtà concreta, solida e riconosciuta anche dai grandi player del mercato.  

Se ti riconosci in questa descrizione, inviaci il tuo CV e raccontaci perché sei la persona giusta.

title: Quality Assurance Consultant
Product and Reliability Engineer
description:
L3Harris is dedicated to recruiting and developing high\-performing talent who are passionate about what they do. Our employees are unified in a shared dedication to our customers’ mission and quest for professional growth. L3Harris provides an inclusive, engaging environment designed to empower employees and promote work\-life success. Fundamental to our culture is an unwavering focus on values, dedication to our communities, and commitment to excellence in everything we do.


L3Harris is the Trusted Disruptor in defense tech. With customers’ mission\-critical needs always in mind, our employees deliver end\-to\-end technology solutions connecting the space, air, land, sea and cyber domains in the interest of national security.

**Job Title – Product and Reliability Engineer**

**Job Location – Italy**

**Job ID – 35152**

 **About this opportunity and L3Harris Italy**


The Product \& Reliability Engineer role is dedicated to ensuring Products and Systems comply with Customer and Technical Requirements, with specific focus on those requiring a Qualification via Test. **What the role will involve**


The responsibilities of your role will include the following:

* Being responsible for Product Qualifications: defines and organizes laboratory tests (EMC, Electrical Safety, Shock and Vibration, Noise, etc.) in compliance with applicable technical standards and customer requirements
* Participates, in collaboration with the Engineering Area, in defining and validating project requirements
* Participates in preparing technical files and in obtaining product certifications in collaboration with the Technical Office and external laboratories/bodies, following their life cycles, from submission to their periodic maintenance
* Manages product regulatory compliance (Guidelines, Directives, Standards, etc.) over the time
* Together with the Engineering Area, the resource responsible for defining, developing, and maintaining testing procedures and technical specifications
* Collaborates in managing the internal testing laboratory and performs tests with its equipment when part of testing or qualifications activities
* Evaluates and proposes predictive and/or other non\-destructive testing methodologies useful for identifying and isolating reliability issues
* Participates in testing new systems, when necessary, to verify compliance with functional specifications
* Participates in Failure Analyses and 8D Reports, overseeing their preparation when necessary
* Provides input for a proper risks management, identifying and addressing aspects that could negatively impact system operation
* Provides technical support to Production or Engineering areas, when necessary

 **What you’ll bring**


The role requires the following experience and skills:

* Master's degree in Electronic Engineering
* Consolidated experience with product standards and testing
* Experience managing product qualifications and certifications, including technical dossiers
* Knowledge of SAP management software is preferred
* Knowledge of quality planning/management tools/systems (APQP) is preferred
company_description: At L3Harris, we are proud to employ innovators and problem solvers dedicated to delivering mission critical solutions our customers on the front lines depend on. Learn more at.L3Harris.com/careers.

title: SAP Controlling Business Analyst
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------



Datalogic Group is looking for a SAP Controlling Business Analyst to join the Global Demand Management and ICT Applications Team within the Information and Communications Technology Department.
This position will play a key role in supporting and improving the company internal financial and cost management processes at global level and will be based in the HQ in Lippo di Calderara (BO).  


ROLE MISSION
The SAP Controlling Business Analyst will be responsible for analyzing, designing, and continuously optimizing business processes related to cost control, internal reporting, and financial forecasting, with a specific focus mainly on the SAP Controlling (CO) module and related tools across the Datalogic Group.
This role is a strategic link between business and IT, ensuring that financial and controlling requirements are effectively translated into functional SAP configurations and digital solutions that support informed decision\-making.  


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather and analyze requirements related to financial control, cost tracking, and internal reporting.
o Identify opportunities to improve efficiency, accuracy, and usability of cost and financial management processes.
o Design solutions, configure and customize SAP CO and PS modules (Cost Center and Profit Center Accounting, Internal Order Management, Standard Costs and Material Ledger Management, WBS, etc.) to align with business requirements.
o Coordinate external consultant support to Project or important Change Request initiatives on Controlling Area.
o Support the improvement of SAP CO and PS for regulatory compliance ensuring that the system meets all user and requirements.
o Collaborate with Business Intelligence team in developing reports to support business decisions, providing analytical support in the areas of cost tracking, profitability analysis, and financial forecasting.
o Participate in cross\-functional projects, contributing on analyzing and explaining on SAP controlling domain to broader digital transformation initiatives.  


*Bachelor's or Master's degree in Finance, Accounting, Information Technology, or a related field.*  

*Fluent in English.*  

*Minimum 3 years of proven experience in SAP CO and PS modules configuration, implementation, and support.*  


* Solid knowledge and understanding of financial processes and cost management.
* Familiarity with other SAP modules (FI, PP, MM, SD) and reporting tools like SAP BW, PowerBI, QlikView would be considered a plus.
* Experience with SAP S/4HANA is a strong plus
